---
title: "Reproducible research - Does it mean anything at all?"
id: material-screencast-gis-reproducible-research-5
order: 302
summary: "Why is reproducible research necessary at all?"
modules:
  - gis-reproducible-research
Goals: []
activities: []
assessments: []
labels:
  - basic
  - talk
  - recommended
published: true
source: "../LV-uav-workflow/morea/gis-reproducible-research/material-screencast-gis-reproducible-research-5.md"
---

# A Few Thoughts Beyond the Scientific Ethical Significance of Reproducible Research

Watch the talk:

<https://www.rstudio.com/resources/rstudioconf-2019/r-markdown-the-bigger-picture/?wvideo=wblobrq76y>

## Connected Module

- [Reproducible Research](../modules/gis-reproducible-research.qmd)
